title: Agent frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a canonical agent file (categories/<id>/<name>.md). The `name`, `description`, `model`, and `tools` fields are read by Claude Code; the rest are repo-local metadata used to generate the catalog and are ignored by runtimes.

name.description: Globally unique kebab-case identifier. MUST equal the filename (without .md).

description.description: When to invoke this agent, in natural language. Drives auto-delegation. Should include trigger phrasing ('Use when…', 'MUST BE USED…') and at least one <example>…<commentary> block.

model.description: Model tier. Use an alias or a full model id.

tools.description: Optional comma-separated tool allowlist (e.g. 'Read, Write, Edit, Bash'). Omit to inherit all tools from the calling context.

category.description: Category id; MUST match the parent folder name in categories/.

tags.description: Lowercase tags powering search and discovery.

color.description: Optional UI hint (inherits the category color by default).

version.description: Optional semver for the agent definition.
